positive: A stylized, symmetrical, high-contrast depiction of a celestial mountain range viewed at dawn. The main subjects are abstract, interlocking geometric structures resembling sharp peaks and flowing nebula clouds. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, radiant gold, burnt orange, and soft lavender, creating a mystical gradient effect. The style must be a blend of Art Deco geometry and ethereal watercolor wash, providing clean, sharp lines against soft, glowing gradients. Composition should be perfectly centered and vertically balanced, optimized for repeating apparel print use, with crisp silhouettes and maximum contrast between the solid structures and the atmospheric background. Clean illustration, vector art aesthetic, photorealistic celestial elements, UHD, highly detailed.
